seoTitle: Clayton vs Clear Lake — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clayton and Clear Lake. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clayton vs Clear Lake: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clayton and Clear Lake.
heading: Clayton vs Clear Lake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clayton, Victoria and Clear Lake, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clayton has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Clear Lake (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clayton or Clear Lake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clayton has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Clear Lake scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clayton scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Clear Lake scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clayton or Clear Lake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clayton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
